name: Realtime Worker Hardening
summary: Harden worker processors, realtime event delivery, and notification API contracts.

notes: Focused regression coverage was added in api/tests/realtime-worker-hardening.test.cjs and passed.
The worker and realtime workspace lint scripts still fail before file linting because ESLint 9 is invoked without a workspace eslint.config.* file.
Realtime session validation now matches the API session key contract and uses the gs: Redis key prefix for session and presence state.

discovered_work: Added api/tests/realtime-worker-hardening.test.cjs to lock the notification, worker, and realtime hardening contract with file-based regression assertions.
Worker and realtime workspace lint scripts are not currently runnable under ESLint 9 because those workspaces do not ship a flat eslint.config.* file.
Realtime auth previously diverged from the API session contract; the live path now checks session:{sub}:{jti} through Redis with the gs: state prefix.
